characters.name: Alisha Marie
characters.description: Alisha MarieFull nameAlisha Marie McDonaldNickname(s)LidaGenderFemaleDate of birthApril 5, 1993Age24 (at episode airing)Resides inLos Angeles, CaliforniaOccupationFashion & Beauty GuruVloggerActressEye colorBrownHair colorBlondeFriendsAmelia DuckworthEva GutowskiEnemiesPatrickAffiliationsAlishaMarieChannelSeason(s)2First seenDr. Wong Doesn't Have Time For Your Sense of HumorSeen inHawkwardPortrayed byAlisha Marie Alisha Mariewas an American Fashion & Beauty Vlogger.  Alisha Marie gained prominence appearing on her own self-titled channel, spotlighting affordable fashion and beauty tips.She portrayed a fictionalized version of herself, fashion vlogger and internet celebrityAlisha Marie Alisha Marie drops by theVuuuglestudios, in order to finish the collaborative DIY project that she and her friend,Amelia Duckworth, have spent weeks developing.   The pair film a video from the lounge announcing their secret team up.  Alisha Marie hints thar it may involve Aloe Vera which Amelia vehemently denies, despite the popularity of Alisha's "Aloe Vera Cures Everything" video, yet Alisha insists the possibility remains, while waving a tube of the product to the audience.   A teen boy walks by carrying a sandwich in his hand, and Alisha claims that a surprising life hack to add texture to any sandwich is to add Aloe Vera and demonstrates by putting some of the goo on the sandwich.  The teen, who Alisha would shortly learn was namedBernie,takes a dubious bite, but soon declares this is how he now eats.    Abruptly, a young boy bursts into the lobby and brazenly demands to see Dare Me Bro.Dirk Mannapproaches the newcomer, identifying him as Patrick.  Having finished his sandwich, Bernie also draws closer, introducing himself, and claiming that kids, like all people, love him.  Alisha and Amelia are shocked, as Patrick responds by punching Bernie in the chest, sending him to the floor, moaning that everyone hates him.   Some hours later, Patrick invades Amelia's studio, and both Alisha and Amelia scream, as they both seize one of the intruder's arms to prevent him from touching their secret project.  The girls force him into a chair, and Amelia warns Patrick not to move.  Dirk and Bernie then arrive, and Amelia explains the situation.  Describing the insolent interloper as a "little monster" she accuses Patrick of trying to destroy the amazing DIY project she and Alisha have spent over a month working on.  Amelia then presents the "Shower Chandelier," a device deigned to hang above a showerhead.  She then shows off the sensory system employed to dispense such substances as shampoo, conditioner, and body wash.  Dirk notes it is both elegant and practical, before offering his typical "Nice" in approval.  Alisha then points out Aloe Vera could also be stored within it but is somewhat abashed when Amelia asks what is her deal.  Patrick then lunges forward intoning "Must Break!"  However, Dirk catches the miscreant and contains him before he can reach his target.  Ali

characters.name: Amelia Duckworth
characters.description: Amelia DuckworthFull nameAmelia DuckworthNickname(s)A Train (byDirk Mann)Sis (byWillow)Big Mels (byWillow)GenderFemaleAge15 (Season 1)16 (Season 2)17 (Season 3)Resides inMalibu, California (currently)Los Angeles, California (formerly)Duckworth family farm, Kentucky (formerly)OccupationStudentVuuuglerEye colorBlueHair colorBlondeFamilyRed Duckworth(father)Unnamed motherWillow(sister)Grandma Schotz(step-mother)Bernie Schotz(step-nephew)RomancesBernie Schotz(one-sided crush onhisside)Victor(former one-sided crush on her side)FriendsRed DuckworthUnknown womanWillowPaige OlveraFrankie WongDirk MannBernie SchotzWillowHorse Face GuyBelissaCelesteEnemiesPaige Olvera(briefly)SchoolSierra High SchoolAffiliationsPerfect Perfection with AmeliaVuuugleSeason(s)1,2,3First seenFirst!Last seenThe End of the BeginningPortrayed byDeVore LedridgeAmelia Duckworthis the deuteragonist inBizaardvark. Amelia has a Vuuugle channel called,Perfect Perfection with Ameliawith over 1 million subscribers. Amelia was in tenth grade atSierra High School.She was portrayed byDeVore Ledridge. According to Amelia's "Draw My Life", she was born and raised on her family's farm in Kentucky and even though she didn't have a lot, she started making her own lipsticks and clothing, so she started her ownVuuuglecalledPerfect Perfection with Ameliaand taught girls how to make lipsticks and clothing and gave makeup tutorials. And she also made a fortune presumably by selling beauty products. Aside from her video channel, Amelia has also been a model. One notable modeling gig was in an advertisement for rolls, where she dressed as some kind of traditional Alpine maiden carrying baskets full of rolls. Amelia is super girly. In many regards, she acts as Paige and Frankie's mentor for Vuuugle, teaching them ways on how to build their following. To most, she is generally dim-witted. She's very self-conscious and egotistical. She reads too much on some small action and jumps to conclusions.

characters.name: Belissa
characters.description: BelissaBelissaCadet BelissaGenderFemaleResides inOmaha, Nebraska (formerly)Tarzana, CaliforniaEye colorBrownHair colorDark BrownFamilyUnnamed parentsCarl {cousin)FriendsPaige Olvera(formerly)Frankie Wong(formerly)EnemiesPaige Olvera (currently)Frankie Wong (currently)SchoolHollander Preparatory Academy(Season 1)East Point Military Academy (Season 2)First seenSuperfanLast seenClash of the SuperfansPortrayed byMaya Jade Frank Frankie Wong(formerly) Frankie Wong (currently) Belissa was very quirky and is 'Bizaardvark's biggest fan'. She reads a lot in any gesture, as shown in her first appearance. She is obsessed with Bizaardvark and goes to huge lengths to help them. She tends to be very loyal and has provided some wisdom. She believes she is perfect the way she looks. Belissa has fair skin, dark brown hair and is usually dressed in Bizaardvark merchandise.

characters.name: Bernie Schotz
characters.description: Bernie SchotzFull nameBernard Miriam SchotzNickname(s)Bernie (by everyone)Bern Man (byDirk Mann)Little Man (byDirk Mann)Idiot (byAmelia Duckworth)The Boy Who Was Nothing (byAmelia Duckworth)Illusior (by himself)GenderMaleAge13 (season 1) 14 (season 2) 15 (season 3)Resides inMalibu, California (currently)Tarzana, California (formerly)OccupationStudentVuuuglerBizaardvark's agent (formerly)Eye colorBrownHair colorBrownFamilyGrandma Schotz(grandmother)Ernie Plotz (cousin)Amelia Duckworth(step-aunt)Willow Duckworth(step-aunt)Red Duckworth(step-grandfather)RomancesAmelia Duckworth(one-sided crush on his side)Will It Melt Girl (one-sided crush on his side)FriendsGrandma SchotzDirk MannPaige OlveraFrankie WongAmelia DuckworthHorse Face GuyBelissaZaneRodneyEnemiesZane(briefly)Rodney(briefly)SchoolSierra High School(currently)Hollander Preparatory Academy(formerly)AffiliationsVuuugleSierra High School(currently)Hollander Preparatory Academy(formerly)Bernie Calls The SchotzSeason(s)1,2,3First seenFirst!Last seenThe End of the BeginningPortrayed byEthan Wacker Bernard Miriam "Bernie" Schotzis one of the main characters inBizaardvark. He wasPaige and Frankie's agent forBizaardvark. He was portrayed byEthan Wacker. Bernie is a funny, adorable, cute, crazy and hilarious teen. He wants to be an agent while also having quickly changing other hobbies like juggling, writing and Irish step dancing. But so far in his agent career, his only clients are his friends, Paige and Frankie. He goes through great lengths to get clients, but he somehow screws up. Bernie is a bit insecure, he listens to motivation tapes resulting in his verbal quirks. These include ending sentences with "...yeah," and his voice trailing when he's about to deliver bad news. He gets excited easily. He is a best friend toDirkand has a huge crush onAmelia.

characters.name: Cady Walls
characters.description: Cady WallsCady WallsNose Kazoo SoloFull nameCady WallsNickname(s)CJGenderFemaleDate of birthNovember 15, 2004Age13 (at episode airing)Resides inLos Angeles, CaliforniaOccupationMusicianActressStudentEye colorBlueHair colorBrownFriendsDirk MannAffiliationsDirk Mann's Jazz QuartetSeason(s)2Seen inChocolate BananasPortrayed byCady Walls Cady Wallswas an American musician and actress.  She was well acquainted withDirk Mann. and accepts his invitation to join a special musical project the Dare Me Bro has impulsively decided to undertake.She portrayed a fictionalized version of herself, musician and internet personalityCady Walls. Cady Walls is contacted by her friend, Dirk Mann, who offers her an opportunity to show off one of her more unique musical talents, by meeting him in the Dare Lair atVuuugleStudios that afternoon.  Upon her arrival, Cady sees Dirk has also recruitedBernie SchotzandHorse Face Guyas well.  Besides hie own drum set, Dirk has set out a few more instruments in the Dare Lair.  He announces that he and Bernie have decided to start a Jazz band.  As the others pick out what they want to play, Dirk hands Cady a kazoo.  Soon the group begins having a practice session playing their various instruments, while Bernie scats out jazzy vocals.  Then Dirk calls out to Cady to preform her special solo.  Sticking the kazoo into one of her nostrils, Cady starts playing the kazoo with her nose.   At the end of rehearsals, Dirk reminds the group that he has already booked them a gig for Thursday night.   As the newly formed jazz combo disperses, Dirk tells Cady that she can keep the kazoo.  Cady, answers "Sweet!" as she opens the door to let Horse Face Guy out of the Dare Lair, before following him out as well.

TeacherHigh School Team Sports CoachEye colorBlueHair colorBrownFamilyUnnamed daughterAffiliationsSierra High SchoolSeason(s)2,3First seenPaige Bugs OutLast seenHalloweenvark Part 3: Mali-Boo!Portrayed byKevin Will Coach Carlsonwas a resident of Tarzana, California and a Gym teacher atSierra High School. Additionally, he is the coach of the Serra Hawks' Wrestling and Girl's Volleyball teams.He was portrayed byKevin Will. Coach Carlson appears as himself during Paige's tale of"Frankle-Stein," and as a "Foam Guy" during Amelia's story"The Foam Pit of Terror."

characters.name: Dirk Mann
characters.description: Dirk MannFull nameDirk MannNickname(s)Dare Me Bro!GenderMaleResides inTarzana, CaliforniaOccupationInternet DaredevilVuuugler (formerly)Eye colorBrownHair colorBlondFamilyKirk Mann(brother)Smirk Mann (younger sister)Unknown girl (younger sister)Unnamed parentsGrandfatherFriendsKirk MannSmirk MannUnknown girlPaige OlveraFrankie Wong(currently)Bernie SchotzAmelia DuckworthBelissaPam (currently)EnemiesVictorPam (formerly)SchoolSierra High School(formerly)AffiliationsDare Me Bro!The Princess UnboxerVuuugle(formerly)Season(s)1,2First seenFirst!Last seenBernie Moves OutPortrayed byJake Paul Dare Me Bro!Channel Dirk Mannwas the tritagonist inBizaardvark.He runs theVuuuglechannelDare Me Bro!.He was portrayed byJake Paul. Dirk runsDare Me Bro!, where he and his crew create videos where they get dares from their viewers, then do them, so he can be wild to some. He is open to any ideas. An example of this is when he attempted to makeBernie Schotzbutt heads with an angry ram. Dirk is hyper at times. He will do any stunt suggested by his viewers. He isn't that bright and lacks common sense in most situations.

characters.name: Eva Gutowski
characters.description: Eva GutowskiFull nameEva Marisol GutowskiNickname(s)MyLifeAsEvaGenderFemaleDate of birthJuly 29, 1994Age22 (at episode airing)Resides inBrea, CaliforniaOccupationActressDJVuuuglerEye colorBrownHair colorBlondeEnemiesHughAffiliationsMyLifeAsEvaChannelVuuugleSeason(s)1Seen inControl + Alt + Escape!Portrayed byEva Gutowski Eva Gutowskiwas an American actress and vlogger. Eva gained prominence appearing onMyLifeAsEvaher channel on YouTube.She portrayed a fictionalized version of herself, actress and internet celebrityEva Gutowski. Expecting to discuss some form of financial matter, Eva Gutowski, accepts the invitation to visit teen billionaire Hugh at his mansion. However, it turns out to be a ruse, and she becomes the latest Vuuugler taken prisoner by the insane fanatic. After strapping her on a hand truck, and wheeling her into a dungeon, Hugh instructs Eva to teach him how to be funny.

characters.name: Frankie Wong
characters.description: Frankie WongFull nameFrancine Hildegard WongNickname(s)Frankie (by everyone)So-Called Best Friend (byPaige Olvera)Former Best Friend (by herself)Hangs with Braids (by Grandma Shotz)Hermana, Sorella, Sister (byWillow)Franklin Delano Paige’s-friend-evelt (byPrincipal Karen)GenderFemaleDate of birthJune 2, 2003Age13 (season 1)14 (season 2)15 (season 3)Resides inMalibu, California (currently)Tarzana, California (formerly)OccupationStudentVuuuglerEye colorBrownHair colorBlackFamilyDoctor Douglas Wong(father)Unnamed motherFriendsPaige OlveraBernie SchotzAmelia DuckworthWillowDirk MannHorse Face GuyBelissaIzzyZaneRodneyEnemiesDirk Mann(briefly)VictorSchoolSierra High School(currently)Hollander Preparatory Academy(formerly)AffiliationsBizaardvark (group)VuuugleSeason(s)1,2,3First seenFirst!Last seenThe End of the BeginningPortrayed byMadison Hu 14 (season 2) 15 (season 3) Frankie is a funny character with a creative mindset. She loves her friend,Paige, and bonds well with her. Frankie also seems to really like theVuuugleStudio, too. She also showed her interest in Blobfish in the episodeFirst!. In comparison to Paige, Frankie is a cynic. She views things with negativity and as a result, can be more pragmatic and rational. She watches Russian soap operas. She also occasionally uses Yiddish words like "bubbeleh" (The Summer of Us) and "mishegoss" (Bizaardvark Changes Lives) which is unexpected because she is Chinese.

characters.name: Izzy
characters.description: IzzyNickname(s)I - SizzleGenderFemaleAge15OccupationStudentEye colorBrownHair colorBrown; DarkFriendsPaige OlveraFrankie WongSeason(s)2Seen inThe BFF (Before Frankie Friend)Portrayed byJenna OrtegaIzzywasPaige Olvera's early childhood BFF (Before Frankie Friend) before her family moved away from Tarzana, California.She was played byJenna Ortega. Izzy is a very likable person. She is very strong and funny. Izzy comes up with nicknames, handshakes/hugs, and inside jokes with everyone. She loves to hug people and gets very touchy when excited. She enjoys horror movies, blue cotton-candy, 3-person sundaes (thrundaes), hugs, the teacups ride, playing truth or dare, mini-golf, making videos, and jokes. When she returns to Tarzana for a visit, Paige grows a bit jealous of how quickly she and Frankie become friends. Izzy has tanned skin, dirty brown hair tied up in a messy tousle bun and brown eyes. She wears a gold blazer jacket, a white graphic top, blue denim and tan high heeled boots like her skin. She is not as tall as the main characters.

characters.name: Liam
characters.description: LiamLiam-BotLiamGenderMaleResides inLos Angeles, CaliforniaOccupationVuuugleChief Executive OfficerEye colorBrownHair colorDark BrownFamilyUnnamed fatherUnnamed motherEnemiesBernie SchotzSchoolOxford UniversityAffiliationsVuuugleSeason(s)1,2,3First seenFirst!Last seenThe End of the BeginningPortrayed byJohnathan McClainLiamwas a resident of Los Angeles, Cailfornia. He was the Chief Executive Officer ofVuuugle, a position forced upon him by his father, who created the company.He was portrayed byJohnathan McClain. Liam communicates through a telepresence drone, "Liam-Bot" that wanders around the Vuuugle studios. He is a graduate ofOxford University. Because of this, he feels degraded by having to work with younger employees such as Paige, Frankie, and Bernie. Liam seems like a typical Oxford snob. He often reacts with scorn over the kinds of material posted on the internet, including material at Vuuugle. Liam seems like a typical Oxford snob. He often reacts with scorn over the kinds of material posted on the internet, including material at Vuuugle.

characters.name: Lilly Singh
characters.description: Lilly SinghFull nameLilly Saini SinghNickname(s)IISuperwomanIIGenderFemaleDate of birthSeptember 26, 1988Age28 (at episode airing)OccupationInternet CelebrityActressHostEye colorBrownHair colorBlackFriendsPaige OlveraFrankie WongSeason(s)1Seen inPaige's Birthday is Gonna Be GreatPortrayed byLilly SinghLilly Singhwas a Canadian actress. host and vlogger.  Lilly gained prominence appearing on theIISuperwomanIIYoutube channel.She portrayed a fictionalized version of herself, internet influencerLilly Singh. Frankie and Amelia scheme to get Paige's favorite online celebrity, Lilly Singh to come to her 14th birthday party. Despite apparent failure, the internet star still somehow arrives at Vuuugle to make Paige's wish come true. File:Bizaardvark - Paige's Birthday is Gonna Be Great - Lilly Singh (IISuperwomanII) - Sneak Peek
